ipfs_id.description: The IPFS CID of the page.

format.description: The digital format of this page, represented by its file-name extension.

ipfs_id.description: The IPFS CID of the transcript file.

transcriber.description: The person who transcribed the page.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the page was transcribed.

content.description: The content of the page, which can have dynamic structure.

original_medium.description: The original medium of the document.

digitisation_date.description: The date when the document was digitized.

digitiser.description: The person or entity that digitized the document.
